extraction.one_line_summary: VLASOV Alexander won after LECHNER and FULSANG split the GC group on the penultimate climb with 4km to go
tactical_patterns: Israel Premier Tech isolated Fulsang by pacing penultimate climb, splitting peloton before their leader counterattacked with 4km remaining.
INEOS chased breakaway without Yates due to COVID, then delivered Thomas to winning move despite temporary isolation.
Five-rider elite group reformed under 2km despite Fulsang's 4km acceleration, suggesting insufficient gap creation on penultimate climb.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: dropped on penultimate climb, rejoined but dropped again on final climb, losing 2+ minutes
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: desperately struggling before final climbs despite classic puncheur profile suiting this finish
rider_signals.FULSANG Jakob: positive: strong enough to attack penultimate climb and initiate winning move despite being marked by entire GC group
rider_signals.VLASOV Alexander: positive: won from reduced sprint after surviving Israeli acceleration tactics, building Tour de Romandie form
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: COVID positive prevented start, entire Jumbo-Visma also withdrew
